# MuleSoft AS2 Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (7.0) of AS2 Connector documentation.
> See [AS2 Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the AS2 Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Sending MDNs to Multiple Partners](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/as2-connector-example-multiple-partners.md)
- [Receiving AS2 Messages and Sending Back MDNs](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/as2-connector-example-receive-send.md)
- [Receiving AS2 MDNs](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/as2-connector-example-receiving-mdn-messages.md)
- [Sending AS2 Messages and Receiving MDNs](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/as2-connector-example-send.md)
- [AS2 Connector 7.0 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/as2-connector-examples.md)
- [AS2 Connector 7.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/as2-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure AS2 Connector 7.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/as2-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating AS2 Connector to Version 7.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/as2-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [AS2 Connector 7.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/as2-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [AS2 Connector 7.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/as2-connector/latest/index.md)
